Name: Convex - Set Environment Variables
Description:
Pushes one or more environment variables to a Convex deployment using the [Convex CLI](https://docs.convex.dev/cli). Useful for syncing secrets and config values from Octopus into your Convex runtime environment prior to or after a deployment.

Variables are provided as a newline-delimited list of `KEY=VALUE` pairs.

Properties.Octopus.Action.Script.ScriptBody:
deployKey=$(get_octopusvariable "ConvexEnvSet.DeployKey")
envVars=$(get_octopusvariable "ConvexEnvSet.EnvironmentVariables")
deploymentType=$(get_octopusvariable "ConvexEnvSet.DeploymentType")
previewName=$(get_octopusvariable "ConvexEnvSet.PreviewName")
workingDir=$(get_octopusvariable "ConvexEnvSet.WorkingDirectory")

if [ -z "$deployKey" ]; then
  echo "ERROR: ConvexEnvSet.DeployKey is required."
  exit 1
fi

if [ -z "$envVars" ]; then
  echo "ERROR: ConvexEnvSet.EnvironmentVariables is required."
  exit 1
fi

if [ -z "$deploymentType" ]; then
  deploymentType="prod"
fi

export CONVEX_DEPLOY_KEY="$deployKey"

if [ -n "$workingDir" ]; then
  echo "Changing to working directory: $workingDir"
  cd "$workingDir" || { echo "ERROR: Could not change to directory '$workingDir'"; exit 1; }
fi

deploymentFlag=""
case "$deploymentType" in
  prod)
    deploymentFlag="--prod"
    ;;
  preview)
    if [ -z "$previewName" ]; then
      echo "ERROR: ConvexEnvSet.PreviewName is required when deployment type is 'preview'."
      exit 1
    fi
    deploymentFlag="--preview-name $previewName"
    ;;
  dev)
    deploymentFlag=""
    ;;
esac

echo "Setting environment variables on Convex deployment ($deploymentType)..."

successCount=0
failCount=0

while IFS= read -r line; do
  line=$(echo "$line" | sed 's/^[[:space:]]*//;s/[[:space:]]*$//')
  [ -z "$line" ] && continue
  [[ "$line" == \#* ]] && continue

  if [[ "$line" != *=* ]]; then
    echo "WARNING: Skipping malformed entry (no '=' found): $line"
    continue
  fi

  key="${line%%=*}"
  value="${line#*=}"

  echo "Setting: $key"
  if npx convex env set $deploymentFlag "$key" "$value"; then
    successCount=$((successCount + 1))
  else
    echo "ERROR: Failed to set variable '$key'."
    failCount=$((failCount + 1))
  fi
done <<< "$envVars"

echo "Done. $successCount variable(s) set successfully, $failCount failed."

if [ "$failCount" -gt 0 ]; then
  exit 1
fi

Parameters.Name: ConvexEnvSet.DeployKey
Parameters.Label: Deploy Key
Parameters.HelpText:
The Convex deploy key for the target project. Store this as a sensitive Octopus variable.

See: [Creating deploy keys](https://docs.convex.dev/cli#deploy-keys)

Parameters.Name: ConvexEnvSet.EnvironmentVariables
Parameters.Label: Environment Variables
Parameters.HelpText:
A newline-delimited list of `KEY=VALUE` pairs to set on the deployment. Blank lines and lines starting with `#` are ignored.

Example:
```
NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=https://api.example.com
SENDGRID_API_KEY=#{SomeOctopusSecret}
```

Parameters.Name: ConvexEnvSet.DeploymentType
Parameters.Label: Deployment Type
Parameters.HelpText:
The Convex deployment to target.

- `prod` — production deployment (default)
- `preview` — preview deployment (requires a preview name)
- `dev` — development deployment

Parameters.Name: ConvexEnvSet.PreviewName
Parameters.Label: Preview Name
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the preview deployment. Only required when **Deployment Type** is `preview`.

Parameters.Name: ConvexEnvSet.WorkingDirectory
Parameters.Label: Working Directory
Parameters.HelpText: Optional. Path to the directory containing your Convex project. Defaults to the current working directory if left blank.
